html:
Exclusive to:  

A Down Feather is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by both the Moose/Goose and her Moslings. Its only purpose is to craft a Luxury Fan or a Weather Pain.

Downloadable Content

Down Feathers are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, they can only be bought for 10 Oincs each at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

Usage

×10

×5

×2

×2


Trivia

  • Down is a layer of soft feathers underneath a bird's exterior feathers used as an insulator and padding.

“Fluffy!”
–Wilson
“So snuggly!”
–Willow
“Tickle tickle tickle!”
–Wolfgang
“Plucked like Abigail was from me.”
–Wendy
“FEATHERS FROM STRANGE LIFEFORMS”
–WX-78
“Soft body down! Makes me wish I could sleep.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pillowy plumage.”
–Woodie
“I could use a pillow filled with these.”
–Maxwell
“Holds a strange connection to the elements.”
–Wagstaff
“A shieldmaiden deserves a söft bed öf dunn.”
–Wigfrid
“Tickle torture.”
–Webber
“It's soft but... a bit grimy.”
–Walani
“A plucked goose was here.”
–Warly
“Thet bird must be 'uge!”
–Woodlegs
“WHEREFORE REST OF BIG BIRD?”
–Wilba
“Tickles. Hehe!”
–Wormwood
“This would be useful if I could find more of them.”
–Wheeler
“I could think of one or two uses for that, tops.”
–Winona
“This feather may help one brave hot weather.”
–Wortox
“Stole it from goose, florp!”
–Wurt
“Goosey.”
–Walter
“I'm sure I'll find a use for it sooner or later.”
–Wanda
A Down Feather is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by both the Moose/Goose and her Moslings. Its only purpose is to craft a Luxury Fan or a Weather Pain.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
Down Feathers are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, they can only be bought for 10 Oincs each at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Down is a layer of soft feathers underneath a bird's exterior feathers used as an insulator and padding.

A '''Down Feather''' is an [[Item]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is dropped by both the [[Moose/Goose]] and her [[Mosling]]s. Its only purpose is to craft a [[Luxury Fan]] or a [[Weather Pain]].
__NOTOC__
==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content==
Down Feathers are also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, they can only be bought for 10 [[Oinc]]s each at [['The Sty' Oddities Emporium]] in the [[Pig City]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Down Feather
|count1 = 10
|item2 = Volt Goat Horn
|item3 = Gears
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Weather Pain}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Down Feather
|count1 = 5
|item2 = Cut Reeds
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Rope
|count3 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Luxury Fan}}


=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* [[Wikipedia:Down feather|Down]] is a layer of soft feathers underneath a bird's exterior feathers used as an insulator and padding.
